title: Cup-Tie Honeymoon
writer: John E. Blakeley, Harry Jackson, Arthur Mertz
actors: Sandy Powell, Dan Young, Betty Jumel
plot: Filmed in Rusholme, Manchester, for the great Mancunian Film Corporation, Cup-tie Honeymoon is a riotous post-war comedy from the North of England where the gags come quicker than the team's wingers!
